prestazioni: Engine: N74B66 6.6L Twin-Turbo V12 (624hp stock) – Full bolt-on turbo upgrade with **Garrett GTX5533R Gen II** turbos (1.35 A/R, 76mm compressor, 88mm turbine) paired with **Precision Turbo & Engine 7675 CEA** wastegates for 900hp+ on 93 octane with **Motec M150 ECU** standalone management (replacing stock Bosch MEVD17.2.9) for precise fueling and ignition control. Custom **Forgeline FT-5** 21x10.5 front / 22x12.5 rear wheels with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R** tires (285/30/21 front, 335/25/22 rear) to handle power delivery.

Exhaust: **Armytrix Valvetronic** 3.5-inch titanium full-system with **Akrapović Racing** carbon-fiber mufflers (replacing stock silencer boxes) and **GESI** high-flow catalytic converters (200-cell, 90% flow efficiency) for a 30% reduction in backpressure while maintaining Euro 6 compliance. **Capristo** 100-cell sports cats for track use only.

Suspension & Handling: **KW Automotive Clubsport** 3-way adjustable coilovers (with **Eibach ERS** race springs, 400 lb/in front, 500 lb/in rear) and **Bilstein B16 PSS10** helper springs for ride height adjustment. **AP Racing** 400mm 6-piston front / 380mm 4-piston rear brake kit with **Carbon Lorraine** CCM-R rotors (floating, 2-piece) and **Ferodo DS3000** pads. **H&R** 25mm front / 20mm rear anti-roll bars with **SuperPro** polyurethane bushings for chassis stiffening.
estetica: Aero: **Vorsteiner V-WE Wraith** carbon-fiber widebody kit (OEM+ fitment, 50mm rear fender flares) with **Rocket Bunny** GT-style front splitter (3D-printed carbon, 3-stage adjustable) and **Seibon** carbon-fiber hood (dual vented, 15kg weight reduction). **Novitec** rear diffuser with integrated **Valenti** LED taillight housing (blackout, sequential turn signals).

Interior: **Recaro Pole Position** carbon-Kevlar bucket seats (FIA 8862-2009 certified) with **Schroth** 6-point harnesses and **Sparco** steering wheel (350mm, Alcantara, quick-release). **Rolls-Royce Bespoke** stitched **Bridge of Weir** leather door cards with **Alcantara** headliner and **Carbon Creations** trim (gloss black, exposed weave). **AEM** CD-7 digital dash (replacing stock analog cluster) with **Racepak** data logger integration.

Lighting & Details: **Lux HID** 5500K Bi-Xenon projector headlights (with **Morimoto** D2S 4.0 bulbs) and **Osram** LED fog lights (6000K, CRI 90+). **Vorsteiner** carbon-fiber side skirts with **Vossen** CVT-R concave wheels (21x10.5 front, 22x12.5 rear, gloss black with polished lip). **3M** 1080 vinyl wrap (Satin Space Gray) with **Avery Dennison** matte clear coat for UV protection. **Brembo** brake caliper covers (gloss black, laser-etched Rolls-Royce logo).
